'''Vendrak V''' was an astronomical object that occupied the fifth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="Rats" /> in the [[Vendrak system/Legends|Vendrak system]]. The [[Star system/Legends|system]] was located in the [[Videnda sector/Legends|Videnda sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]].<ref name="Region" /> Vendrak V was the site of a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] that featured at least one large [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]].<ref name="Rats" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], [[Alliance Military/Legends|Rebel forces]] were operating on Vendrak V. Intending to lure the Rebels into a trap, [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] planted false information that lead the Alliance to believe a hangar in the local starport contained a batch of potentially useful weaponry.<ref name="Rats" />

Acting on the information, the Rebel [["Victor" squad]] and [["Bravo" Squad]] snuck into the hangar, where the Imperial trap was then sprung. Surprising the Rebels, two [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] entered the hangar and in the following [[Battle on Vendrak V|battle]] attempted to prevent them from escaping.<ref name="Rats" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vendrak V was introduced in "[[Like Rats in a Trap]]," a scenario for use with ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles]]'' included in the [[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|rulebook]] of the game. The [[1991]] book was authored by [[Stephen Crane]] and [[Paul Murphy]].<ref name="Rats1">{{WEGCite|story=Like Rats in a Trap|book=Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|reprint=1}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vendrak system, and therefore Vendrak V, in grid square M-18.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
